theme.description: A premium, distraction-free Islamic EdTech experience focusing on elegant typography, deep moody backgrounds, and high-contrast gold accents for interactive elements.

structure.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-80 border-r border-[#c8943f]/15 bg-[#070a0f] flex flex-col
structure.audio_player_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-80 right-0 h-24 bg-[#070a0f]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#c8943f]/15 z-50 flex items-center px-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#c8943f] text-[#070a0f] hover:bg-[#e6b058] font-medium transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-2
buttons.secondary: border border-[#c8943f]/30 text-[#c8943f] hover:bg-[#c8943f]/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-2
buttons.ghost: text-[#8b95a5] hover:text-[#c8943f] hover:bg-[#c8943f]/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-[#0d131f] border border-[#c8943f]/15 p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-[#c8943f]/30 transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: bg-[#070a0f]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#c8943f]/20 p-6 md:p-8

surah_list_item.default: flex items-center justify-between p-4 cursor-pointer text-[#8b95a5] hover:text-[#c8943f] hover:bg-[#c8943f]/5 border-b border-[#c8943f]/10 transition-colors
surah_list_item.active: flex items-center justify-between p-4 cursor-pointer text-[#c8943f] bg-[#c8943f]/10 border-l-2 border-[#c8943f]

verse_container.wrapper: py-10 border-b border-[#c8943f]/10 flex flex-col gap-6
verse_container.arabic_text: text-right font-['Amiri_Quran'] text-4xl sm:text-5xl leading-[2.5] text-[#fdfbf7]
verse_container.translation_text: text-left font-['Cormorant_Garamond'] text-xl sm:text-2xl text-[#8b95a5] leading-relaxed

tajweed_recorder.wrapper: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-8
tajweed_recorder.mic_button: w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-[#c8943f]/10 border border-[#c8943f]/30 flex items-center justify-center text-[#c8943f] hover:bg-[#c8943f]/20 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 relative
tajweed_recorder.mic_pulse: absolute inset-0 rounded-full border border-[#c8943f] animate-ping opacity-20

search_input.input: w-full bg-[#0d131f] border border-[#c8943f]/20 text-[#fdfbf7] placeholder-[#8b95a5] px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#c8943f]/50 transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with a strict dark theme.
Use ONLY #070a0f for the main background and #c8943f for the gold accent. Do not introduce standard Tailwind grays like slate or zinc.
Import Google Fonts 'Amiri Quran', 'Outfit', and 'Cormorant Garamond' in your main HTML or CSS.
The layout must feature a fixed left sidebar (w-80) for Surah navigation and a main content area with max-w-4xl for the reading view.
Implement the audio player as a sticky bottom bar with glassmorphism (bg-[#070a0f]/80 backdrop-blur-xl).
For the Mushaf Reader, words currently being played in the audio MUST be highlighted using the gold accent color (#c8943f).
The Tajweed Practice UI should be a pure CSS/Lucide mockup: a large central microphone button with a CSS 'animate-ping' border to simulate recording.
Every interactive element (button, list item, audio control, input) MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute.
Do not use card components with soft shadows. Use sharp, flat rectangles with subtle gold borders (border-[#c8943f]/15).
All components must be accessible; ensure high contrast for all readable text.
